name: Maltego
description: Graphical link-analysis platform that maps relationships between people, emails, social profiles, domains, IPs and orgs using transforms over public data.
bestFor: Mapping and visualizing connections between a missing person, their associates, social profiles and online identifiers in a single graph.
trustNote: Industry-standard OSINT/link-analysis tool used widely by law enforcement, intelligence and investigative journalists; named on osint-news.com (acquired Hunchly).
notes: Community Edition (CE) is free and now allowed for commercial use with no entity-paste limits, but commercial-data transforms are limited (~200 monthly credits) and CE requires registration. Desktop app; paid Pro/Enterprise tiers unlock more transforms, data and seats. Source: osint-news.com tools category.

name: Criminal IP
description: Cyber-threat-intelligence OSINT search engine for IP addresses, domains, open ports, exploits and internet-exposed assets/images.
bestFor: Infrastructure/CTI lookups on IPs and domains tied to an investigation; situational for missing-persons (e.g. tracing a server or device behind an online account).
trustNote: Commercial CTI search engine (AI Spera) with a free membership tier; launched/covered on osint-news.com. Primarily security/infra focused.
notes: Free membership gives ~10 searches/day with limited data and no API; API and higher search volumes require paid plans (Standard $49/mo, Unlimited $149/mo). Best for IP/domain/infrastructure intel rather than directly locating a person. Source: osint-news.com tools category.

name: Google Images (About this image / reverse image search)
description: Free reverse-image search and image-context tool that surfaces where an image appears online and provides background/'about this image' details.
bestFor: Reverse-searching a photo of a missing person to find other appearances online, original source, and contextual metadata.
trustNote: Google's own free image search and 'About this image' context feature, covered by osint-news.com as a new image-context tool.
notes: Use the camera icon / Google Lens to reverse search a photo; the 'About this image' panel shows when an image was first indexed, where it appears, and how outlets describe it. Pair with Yandex/Bing/PimEyes for broader face coverage. Source: osint-news.com tools category (article on Google's image-context tool).
